Official NeurIPS 2025 style asset vendored from the conference style bundle.

- Source: https://media.neurips.cc/Conferences/NeurIPS2025/Styles.zip
- Retrieved: 2026-04-13
- Included file: `neurips_2025.sty`

The manuscript typesetting pipeline stages this file into the output directory so generated `.tex` and `.pdf` artifacts compile against the pinned official style rather than a hand-rolled approximation.
